justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to fully remove the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (only commented out the @Override annotation, leaving the class extending it). It also introduces a behavioral change in HomeController.java by replacing session.invalidate() with request.logout(), which may not be equivalent. The pom.xml changes are mostly correct but include unnecessary dependency management for JSTL and switch to a milestone version of commons-email2-jakarta.
